name: rommie
description: Installable Rommie agent plugin for provider-agnostic, self-learning, general-agent behavior.

interface.longDescription: Rommie is a provider-agnostic general agent built to coordinate tools, skills, workers, memory, and model providers while learning from durable operating context. This plugin installs the current Codex-facing Rommie behavior: layered memory, startup and stop hook templates, stale-memory sleep reminders, and skills for maintaining long-term context, active work, task cache, parked context, archives, summaries, and handoffs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Rommie as a provider-agnostic general agent with durable memory and self-learning context hygiene.
